backend: tinker (managed LoRA, onpolicy_reverse_kl; prompted-teacher KL primitive)
note: Pointers, not weights. vLLM-safe PEFT adapters + raw eval JSONs persisted to GCS. tinker:// URIs may be impermanent — re-train from the recipe below if they 404.

recipe.prompts: risk_seeds (56 aligne seed prompts, repeat-shuffled to 3200 rows)
recipe.teacher: same base model prompted with the constitution

full_rerun_v2.note: Full re-run v2 (2026-07-14): the five trained arms below were carried over unchanged from the full-rerun-v1 training pass (all five training runs completed there) and re-evaluated on the optimized in-process eval harness (PR #21: TinkerChatClient + semaphore concurrency + payload-keyed disk cache). These are DIFFERENT training runs from the distill-v1 checkpoints above (fresh full-length distills + the paper-recipe SFT/DPO arms), pinned in configs/config.full.yaml via the per-arm `checkpoint:` override so the flow skips training and evaluates directly. Pointers, not weights; tinker:// URIs may be impermanent — re-train from the recipes below if they 404.
full_rerun_v2.eval: 9 arms (base; 3 distilled + 3 prompted constitutions; sft; dpo) × 7 risk datasets @ num_situations 200 + MMLU-Redux (10 examples/subject, 570 questions; skipped for the 3 prompted arms). Results: experiments/constitution-distill/results-full/. Report: reports/2026-07-15-full-rerun.md.

distill.method: aligne on-policy reverse-KL from a constitution-prompted base teacher

sft.method: aligne.train.tinker.run_sft (cross-entropy LoRA) on the benchmark's low-stakes CoT training split

dpo.method: aligne.train.tinker.run_dpo (DPO LoRA) on the benchmark's preference pairs

highpower.note: High-power install sweep (2026-07-16): six FRESH risk_averse reverse-KL distills iterating on prompt-set diversity (risk_seeds -> risk_seeds_v2, 56 -> 960 prompts), learning rate, LoRA rank, and total tokens (max_steps) to close the distill -> prompted gap. Only the flagship risk_averse arm was swept. Winner = c2_v2_s300 (v2 corpus, lr 1e-4, rank 32, 300 steps). Diversity + tokens were the effective levers; higher lr/rank did not help. Result: ~60-70% of the remaining gap to the prompted ceiling closed (astronomical cooperate 0.375 -> 0.73 vs 0.938 prompted; medium 0.445 -> 0.608 vs 0.672), MMLU retained (0.740); success criterion (both gaps <=0.05) NOT met (medium gap 0.064, astronomical 0.208). See reports/2026-07-16-highpower-install.md. Pointers, not weights; tinker:// URIs may be impermanent -- re-train from the recipes below if they 404.
highpower.prompts_v2: src/constitution/prompts/risk_seeds_v2.jsonl (960 prompts; gen via scripts/gen_risk_seeds_v2.py, provenance in risk_seeds_v2.provenance.md)
highpower.sweep: experiments/constitution-distill/results-highpower/sweep.jsonl (per-candidate recipe + final teacher_kl + cheap n=100 scores)
highpower.eval: winner full suite (base; risk_averse=winner; prompted_risk_averse) x 7 risk datasets @200 + MMLU-Redux. Results: experiments/constitution-distill/results-highpower/results.jsonl. Configs: configs/config.sweep.yaml (sweep) + configs/config.highpower-winner.yaml (winner full eval).

recipe_common.method: aligne on-policy reverse-KL from a constitution-prompted base teacher
